items.title: Can Entrepreneurs Save Capitalism From Itself?
items.description: In our new book, Capital Evolution: The New American Economy we argue that capitalism’s next chapter won’t be written by policymakers alone.

items.title: 4 Ways to Attract More Clients as a Solopreneur
items.description: As a solo business owner, the key to winning clients is about building trust.

items.title: What Comes Next After AI Eats All The Tech Companies?
items.description: I opened up a can of worms yesterday when I called the end of the reign of the megacaps.

items.title: The NBA Didn’t Fix Its All-Star Game. It Fixed the Incentives
items.description: The problem usually isn’t your people. It’s the game you’ve designed for them to play.

items.title: Why Amazon Founder Jeff Bezos Says the Answer to This Question is the Surest Path to Business Success
items.description: Sure, be innovative… but first, focus on things that won’t change.
